title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 15–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Chopper, Reiju, Unknown person #14, Sanji, Niji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Someone, I need immediate help!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Please, call a Doctor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey, don't pass out on me now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that little piss stain... it had to be him... only he'd be this vindictive!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the hell did this girl ever do to you?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What kind of man beats a woman to the point that she's rendered unconscious?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't even call him scum... he's the shit that's buried beneath it!!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: You brought all this on yourself, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yonji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's what happens when you stick up for the peasants.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Aren'tcha just itching to see Niji?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All signs point to him being the culprit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Come with me! I'll lead the way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ...Fine by me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: where are...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You remember this place, don't you?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After all, we tried our Damndest to get in here back when we were kids.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: 54 of type MB.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: 30 of type mist.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need 21 more extras for type mh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What the FU...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Could it be...?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 22 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
